# MyProject 🚀

[![Build Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-passing-brightgreen)](https://example.com)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](LICENSE)
[![Coverage](https://img.shields.io/badge/coverage-92%25-green)](https://example.com)
[![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-1.0.0-blue)](https://crates.io)

A powerful and intuitive toolkit for modern software development.
MyProject streamlines your workflow with its comprehensive feature set.

## ✨ Features

- [x] Real-time processing
- [x] Seamless integration with existing tools
- [x] Extensible and modular architecture
- [x] Type-safe API with full documentation
- [x] Comprehensive test coverage
- [x] Zero-config setup for common use cases
- [x] Cross-platform compatibility

## 📦 Installation

Add MyProject to your `Cargo.toml`:

```toml
[dependencies]
myproject = "1.0.0"
```

## 🚀 Getting Started

### Prerequisites

- Rust 1.70+
- Cargo

### Installation

1. Clone the repository
2. Run `cargo build`
3. Run `cargo test`

## 📖 Usage

```rust
use myproject::Client;

let client = Client::new();
client.process(data)?;
```

## ⚙️ Configuration

Configure MyProject using a `myproject.toml` file at the project root:

```toml
[settings]
verbose = false
threads = 4
```
